title: Eight weeks of LLM pricing data show stability at major labs but a huge cost spread
friendlyTitle: LLM prices stayed mostly stable, but cheap and expensive models are far apart
summary: Token Prices tracked 1,111 models across 33 providers for 59 days and found that major closed-model providers kept prices stable during the period, while the overall input-token price range stretched as wide as 600x. The analysis also found that detected price changes were not consistently announced directly to users.
friendlySummary: A pricing tracker watched more than a thousand AI models for eight weeks and found a very large gap between the cheapest and most expensive options.
whyItMatters: For teams building with AI, model choice is now a product and finance decision, not just a benchmark contest. Regular price checks and routing by task can save serious money without necessarily sacrificing quality where frontier models are unnecessary.
friendlyWhyItMatters: If you build with AI, choosing the right model for each task can make a big difference to your bill.
